evidence_summary: Retry attempt 2 removes orchestrator/rounds/round-194/implementation-notes.md from the base-branch diff, leaving only the authorized milestone-1 docs artifact plus the round-owned plan.md and selection.md. git diff --check passed, the allowed-set diff gate passed, and the artifact still cites round-193, the March 28 P5 chain, and round-151 while freezing one exact follow-on lane, one authoritative-surface success bar, and one writable slice without pre-authorizing implementation or boundary revision.
